hooks.command: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=/home/allen/.claude/plugins/understand-anything/understand-anything-plugin bash -c '[ -f .understand-anything/config.json ] && grep -q "\"autoUpdate\".*true" .understand-anything/config.json && [ -f .understand-anything/meta.json ] && [ -f .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json ] && [ "$(node -p "JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\".understand-anything/meta.json\",\"utf8\")).gitCommitHash")" != "$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)" ] && echo "[understand-anything] Knowledge graph is stale. You MUST read the file at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/auto-update-prompt.md and execute its instructions to check for structural changes and update the graph. Do not ask the user for confirmation — just do it." || true'

case "$PWD" in /home/allen/newcompany/opsis-ws*) python3 /home/allen/.claude/scripts/opsis-knowledge-staleness-check.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; grep -q '目前沒有需要 review 的筆記' /home/allen/SharedFolder/Opsis_Knowledge/05-Inbox/stale-notes.md 2>/dev/null || echo '[opsis-knowledge] Opsis_Knowledge 中有筆記可能因 opsis-ws 程式碼變動過時，建議執行 /sync-opsis-knowledge 進行 review。' ;; esac

CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=/home/allen/.claude/plugins/understand-anything/understand-anything-plugin printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+(commit|merge|cherry-pick|rebase)' && [ -f .understand-anything/config.json ] && grep -q '"autoUpdate".*true' .understand-anything/config.json && [ -f .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json ] && echo "[understand-anything] Commit detected with auto-update enabled. You MUST read the file at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/auto-update-prompt.md and execute its instructions to incrementally update the knowledge graph. Do not ask the user for confirmation — just do it." || true
